nasb.text: Behold, I am standing by the spring, and the daughters of the men of the city are coming out to draw water;

esv.text: Behold, I am standing by the spring of water, and the daughters of the men of the city are coming out to draw water.

cnv.text: 我現在站在水泉旁邊，城內居民的女兒正出來打水。

ccb.text: 现在，我站在这泉水旁，城里的少女正出来打水。

csbs.text: 看哪，我站在水泉旁，这城里人家的女儿们正出来打水。
